display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants James Pickens Jr., Brooke Burns and Johnny Weir.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Steven Weber, Shane Battier and Melissa Fumero.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Sisters Denise, a bus driver, and Tisha, an electrician, from Milwaukee, Wis., put their technical skills to work on the wall.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Charest family vs. White family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Charest family vs. Dang family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Huckleberry family vs. Davis family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Swanson family vs. Davis family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Nelon family vs. Ham family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey assumes the hosting duties for this daytime game show in which five members of one family are pitted against five members of another family. Each team's goal is to guess the results of audience survey questions. A player from each team initially faces off, answering the question to earn the chance to either pass or play. The winning family gets a chance to earn extra cash in a bonus r

programme.title: Healthy Joints for Life With Rich Diana
programme.desc: Healthy Joints for Life! Episode 1 of world-renowned orthopedist and longevity researcher Dr. Rich Diana's new series on healthy aging; learn about the real causes behind joint aging, and the promising new drug, supplement and therapy options.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Healthy Joints for Life With Rich Diana
programme.desc: Healthy Joints for Life! Episode 1 of world-renowned orthopedist and longevity researcher Dr. Rich Diana's new series on healthy aging; learn about the real causes behind joint aging, and the promising new drug, supplement and therapy options.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Get A Beautiful New Smile in 24 Hours
programme.desc: The Wellness Hour: Dr. Alvarez explores how Nuvia delivers a beautiful new smile in just 24 hours.

programme.title: Gospel of Christ
programme.desc: The Gospel of Christ with Ben Bailey - Taking the Whole Gospel to the Whole World.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Celebrity guests Natalie Morales, Mary McCormack, Chelsea Handler and Willie Garson.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Celebrity guests Curtis Stone, Hal Sparks, Lauren Lapkus and Lindsay Price.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: An interactive bridge dares players to cross by stepping on the right answers to challenging trivia questions; each step forward puts money in the team's bank, with bonus money for each successful crossing.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Two contestants compete to place three marks in a row on trivia board avoiding a dragon that can steal turns; the winner faces the dragon in a final round where it blocks three-in-a-row attempts to prevent the $10,000 prize win.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Contestants compete in a dynamic blend of trivia and bingo.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Tara Lipinski plays for Amy Selkirk Breast Cancer Research Fund at the Baylor Scott & White Dallas Foundation, Raven-Symoné plays for Goodwill Southern California, and Tori Spelling plays for Every Mother Counts.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Mira Sorvino, Adam Rodriguez and Peter Schrager.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Lisa, a mental health counselor from Wanatah, Ind., and Dan, a construction analyst and woodworker, take on the wall; with big drops, this married couple work their total to epic heights and attempt to walk away with a massive payout.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Eastern Conference Second Round, Game 4.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Avalanche face the Wild in Game 3 of the West second round at Grand Casino Arena in St. Paul. Colorado has won two straight. Martin Necas scored in Game 2, but Kirill Kaprizov tied it six seconds later for the fifth-fastest response in history.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: The White Sox Podcast With Chuck Garfien
Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: All the latest action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: The White Sox Podcast With Chuck Garfien
The Big Pro Football Show
programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: All the latest action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: MidWest Outdoors
programme.desc: Hunting, boating, canoeing, camping, hiking, snowmobiling.

programme.title: Men's Health - All-Natural Secret for Prostate Health
programme.desc: Prosvent is a doctor formulated blend of rejuvenating herbs and nutrients that help protect overall prostate health.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Going To The Bathroom Too Much?
programme.desc: Better Bladder is a new safe and natural alternative to drugs, surgery and adult diapers. 90 percent see fewer bathroom visits, leaks & accidents. Tune in for a special TV offer!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Men's Health - All-Natural Secret for Prostate Health
programme.desc: Prosvent is a doctor formulated blend of rejuvenating herbs and nutrients that help protect overall prostate health.

programme.title: Going To The Bathroom Too Much?
programme.desc: Better Bladder is a new safe and natural alternative to drugs, surgery and adult diapers. 90 percent see fewer bathroom visits, leaks & accidents. Tune in for a special TV offer!

programme.title: Bears Podcast
programme.desc: Get the latest on the Chicago Bears with Ruthie Polinsky and Clay Harbor, featuring game previews, reactions, analysis and exclusive interviews.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Men's Health - All-Natural Secret for Prostate Health
programme.desc: Prosvent is a doctor formulated blend of rejuvenating herbs and nutrients that help protect overall prostate health.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: MidWest Outdoors
programme.desc: Hunting, boating, canoeing, camping, hiking, snowmobiling.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. Discussions include golf courses, equipment, apparel, and include interviews with golf personalities, tour pros, top swing instructors, and celebrities.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: All the latest action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: All the latest action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Top Prospects
programme.desc: An inside look at the top prospects in the Chicago White Sox organization.

programme.title: The Big Pro Football Show
programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.title: Bears Podcast
programme.desc: Get the latest on the Chicago Bears with Ruthie Polinsky and Clay Harbor, featuring game previews, reactions, analysis and exclusive interviews.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. Discussions include golf courses, equipment, apparel, and include interviews with golf personalities, tour pros, top swing instructors, and celebrities.

programme.title: Live: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From Mountain Ridge Country Club in West Caldwell, N.J.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Golf
programme.desc: From The Woodlands Country Club in The Woodlands, Texas.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, N.C.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Round 3 of the Myrtle Beach Classic begins at Dunes Golf and Beach Club. Following the 36-hole cut, the remaining golfers jockey for position on the leaderboard during the critical third round to set up Sunday's championship finish.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Golf
programme.desc: From The Woodlands Country Club in The Woodlands, Texas.

programme.title: Live: DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The final round of the Catalunya Championship takes place at Real Club de Golf El Prat in Barcelona. As the concluding event of the DP World Tour's season-opening European Swing, the champion is awarded a significant haul of Race to Dubai points.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central Pregame
programme.desc: Golf Central Pregame preps viewers for all the tournament action, with up-to-date scores, interviews, and analysis.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The final round of this Signature Event on the PGA TOUR concludes at the Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. The players compete for the largest portion of the $20 million purse and 700 FedExCup points awarded to the winner.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Round 4 of the Myrtle Beach Classic serves as the final day of competition at Dunes Golf and Beach Club. The final 18 holes determine the winner of the 2026 trophy and the top share of the $4 million purse in this PGA Tour event today.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Champions Golf
programme.desc: From The Woodlands Country Club in The Woodlands, Texas.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The final round of this Signature Event on the PGA TOUR concludes at the Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. The players compete for the largest portion of the $20 million purse and 700 FedExCup points awarded to the winner.

programme.title: SIGN OFF

programme.title: Africa Eco Race
programme.desc: The latest motorsport highlights from the Africa Eco race.

programme.desc: Philadelphia Flyers v Carolina Hurricanes (Face-off 11.00pm). Coverage of game four of the Eastern Conference play-offs second round from Xfinity Mobile Arena.

programme.title: NHL: This is Hockey
programme.desc: A look at the growth of ice hockey in Colombia.

programme.title: Sporting Greats
programme.desc: Legendary sporting figures discuss their careers.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 20 defensemen currently in the NHL.

programme.title: United Rugby Championship
programme.desc: Connacht v Munster.

programme.title: Michelin Le Mans Cup
programme.desc: Action from Castelet.

programme.title: United Rugby Championship
programme.desc: Leinster v Lions.

programme.desc: Mallorca v Villarreal (Kick-off 1.00pm). Coverage of the Spanish top-flight match from Estadi Mallorca San Moix.

programme.desc: Villarreal v Levante.

programme.desc: Athletic Bilbao v Valencia (Kick-off 3.15pm). Coverage of the Spanish top-flight match from San Mamés.

programme.desc: Valencia v Atletico Madrid.

programme.desc: Real Oviedo v Getafe (Kick-off 5.30pm). Coverage of the Spanish top-flight match from Estadio Municipal Carlos Tartiere.

programme.desc: Barcelona v Real Madrid (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the Spanish top-flight match from Spotify Camp Nou.

programme.desc: Real Betis v Real Oviedo.

programme.title: Live Brasileiro Serie A
programme.desc: Corinthians v Sao Paulo (Kick-off 10.30pm). Coverage of the match from Corinthians Arena.

programme.title: Live NHL Ice Hockey
programme.desc: Montreal Canadiens v Buffalo Sabres (Face-off TBA). Coverage of game three of the Eastern Conference play-offs second round from Bell Centre.

programme.title: Women's Preview Show
programme.desc: Join us as we preview LFC Women's FA Cup Semi Final match against Brighton.

programme.title: Sixty Minutes
programme.desc: Former Liverpool defender Neil Ruddock reflects on his colourful career with the Reds.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: From two-yard tap-ins to unstoppable scorchers - and the odd no-look finish - sit back and enjoy all 111 of the samba star's goals in a Liverpool shirt.

programme.title: We are Liverpool
programme.desc: One of the club's finest goalscorers joins the show to chat about his career and what it meant to represent his club.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single one of Steven Gerrard's 186 goals for the Reds in a bumper three hour goal-fest.

programme.title: Sixty Minutes
programme.desc: In this 2015 interview, LFCTV sits down with Terry McDermott to talk about his career at Liverpool.

programme.title: Women's Preview Show
programme.desc: Join us as we preview LFC Women's FA Cup Semi Final match against Brighton.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A look back at some of Steven Gerrards greatest goals.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of goals scored by Adam Lallana.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans.

programme.title: Women's Preview Show
programme.desc: Join us as we preview LFC Women's FA Cup Semi Final match against Brighton.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: We are Liverpool
programme.desc: Our brand new podcast show launches as Peter McDowall & Robbie Fowler sit down with Liverpool's number 7 to discuss his life on and off the pitch.

programme.title: This is Liverpool FC TV HD
Live: Women
programme.desc: Live audio commentary as Liverpool Women take on Brighton in the FA Cup Semi Final.

programme.title: Liverpool U18
programme.desc: The best of the action as Liverpool U18 take on Middlesborough.

programme.title: What LFC Means to Me
programme.desc: King of the Kop Kenny Dalglish speaks exclusively to LFCTV about his feelings for the club.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Diogo Jota.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Cody Gakpo.

programme.title: Better Than Brazil
programme.desc: An LFC Originals mini-documentary that relives the famous night in April 1988 when Liverpool put five past Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: Gerrard: My Liverpool
programme.desc: Liverpool legend Steven Gerrard relives the highs and lows of his illustrious Anfield career, featuring exclusive interviews with those who know him best.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Steven Gerrard joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 2005 Champions league Final.

programme.title: What LFC Means to Me
programme.desc: Former Liverpool midfielder Xabi Alonso speaks exclusively to LFCTV about his feelings for the club.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Chelsea.

programme.title: Kings of Europe
programme.desc: History is made at Wembley as Liverpool defeat Club Brugge and become the first British side to retain the coveted trophy.

programme.title: Shankly's Second Coming
programme.desc: An LFC Originals documentary that charts the rise of Bill Shanklys second great team and how it came to fruition with an unprecedented double in 1972/73.

programme.title: St John & Yeats Talk Shankly
programme.desc: Ian St John and Ron Yeats reflect on their time at Liverpool with the great Bill Shankly.

programme.title: Double Winners '86
programme.desc: On The March With Kenny's Army: A feature-length documentary telling the story of Liverpool's unforgettable 1985/86 double-winning season.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Chelsea.

programme.desc: Featuring interviews and images of American sports figures.

programme.desc: Expert players from around the U.S. gather to face off in a high stakes game of Poker. Who walks away with the grand prize in the 2022 U.S. Poker Open?

programme.desc: Featuring interviews and images of American sports figures.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance features top-ranked fighters, up and coming fighters, intense action and footage from some of the biggest names in combat sports and exclusive content spanning MMA, boxing, kickboxing, bare knuckle boxing, muay thai and more.

programme.desc: Coverage of soccer action from the development league.

programme.desc: Coverage of soccer action from the development league.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.desc: Action from the Shaun White founded professional snowboarding and free skiing league.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: The "Mad Fisherman" brings you the best of New England fishing.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony and the crew travel around America to find great food, drinks, fun and adventure.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Classic car collections, memorabilia and collectibles.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Paul Mennett heads to Ocala, Fla., to see more of National Parts Depot's Collection with a look at some rare pick-up trucks.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Switzerland is qualification masters, Virgil van Dijk might be the best defender in the world, and Haiti will bring their unique culture to the global stage.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Bafana Bafana return for the first time since hosting in 2010, Austria is reborn under Ralf Rangnick, and Thibaut Courtois is the leading goalkeeper in the world.

programme.title: Dirty Water TV
programme.desc: The best parties, hottest venues, and coolest destinations in New England nightlife.

programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Life in Between Gates
programme.desc: Following racers as they prepare for their first event of the season in Colorado.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Twenty high-stakes poker players have busted from the WPT Alpha8 poker tournament, leaving three skilled mavericks to fight it out.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.title: Golf Destination
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the world's greatest golf courses.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Captain Don and Liz Weirauch own The Anglers Edge in Carson Valley, Nev. Their fly-fishing expertise is legendary.

programme.title: New England Traveler
programme.desc: Greg flies to Nantucket aboard a private seaplane and takes in the history of The Nantucket Whaling Museum, learning about the island's conservation mission at The National Wildlife Refuge and exploring the Cisco Brewers and Triple Eight Distillery.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads to Portsmouth, N.H., and starts off by diving into a historic submarine. After that, he tastes some beers, plays some indoor golf simulator and has some delicious tacos alongside some top-shelf tequila.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Behind the B
programme.desc: The Bruins face off against the Sabres in Round One of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. Plus, ride along with Mark Kastelic as he prepares for Game 3, and Jack Edwards gets the crowd going as Fan Banner Captain.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox First Pitch
programme.desc: A preview of the upcoming game and news and analysis from industry insiders.

programme.title: Red Sox GameDay Live
programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Boston's own comedian Dave Russo appears on the Charlie Moore show; Charlie interviews Dave regarding his appearance with Wayne Newton; Dave offers up his opinion on being a comedian; Charlie and Dave visit Fulchino Vineyard to taste test the wine.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: A social media post haunts Charlie as someone claims to have found the lost lake in the state of Florida. Mad Fish and the crew head to Florida in search of the lost lake.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Join in as we unlock New Hampshire's gate city. We are heading to Nashua for a day packed of nostalgia at Fun World followed by some authentic Italian dishes, sweet treats and a local beer flight to top things off.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads out in search of some of the best burgers New England has to offer. He visits the seacoast NH area and visits Hop and Grind and also Gibbs Garage Bar and Grille then scoots to Salem, Mass., to critique Boston Burger and Bit Bar.

programme.desc: Classic car collections, memorabilia and collectibles.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Get to know cousins and Ohio State baseball players, Henry Kaczmar and Mason Eckelman. Learn about the legacy of Iowa baseball dads and sons. Purdue's Anna Moore discusses the loss of her dad and her relationship with softball. Hear about Illinois Softball's mentality of Taking Care of Blue.

programme.desc: Get to know cousins and Ohio State baseball players, Henry Kaczmar and Mason Eckelman. Learn about the legacy of Iowa baseball dads and sons. Purdue's Anna Moore discusses the loss of her dad and her relationship with softball. Hear about Illinois Softball's mentality of Taking Care of Blue.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Looking back at what is known as "The Catch," hear from Trojans quarterback Rodney Peete and wide receiver Erik Affholter as they relive the controversial play that sent USC to the 1988 Rose Bowl with a win over crosstown rival UCLA.

programme.title: USC Football Classic
programme.desc: King Miller rushed for 124 yards and two touchdowns to help lead the 17th-ranked Trojans to a 29-10 win over the Bruins. From Nov. 29, 2025.
